scripts.server:start: node apps/backend/dist/index.js > /tmp/impact-mapping-copilot.log 2>&1 & echo $! > .impact-mapping-copilot.pid && echo "Server started on :3333 (PID $(cat .impact-mapping-copilot.pid)) — logs: /tmp/impact-mapping-copilot.log"
scripts.server:stop: pid=$(lsof -ti:3333 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$pid" ]; then kill $pid && echo "Server stopped (PID $pid)"; else echo "Server not running"; fi; rm -f .impact-mapping-copilot.pid
scripts.server:restart: npm run server:stop --silent; sleep 1; npm run server:start --silent
scripts.server:status: pid=$(lsof -ti:3333 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$pid" ]; then echo "Running on :3333 (PID $pid)"; else echo "Not running"; fi
